fields.label: Hero: subtitle

fields.label: Product overview: Biochar
fields.value: Carbon-negative residue from wood waste via pyrolysis — for road base, concrete and sustainable agriculture.

fields.label: Product overview: Hardwood Plywood
fields.value: Malaysian tropical hardwoods, dual-adhesive options, CE marked for global construction markets.

fields.label: Product overview: Birch Face Plywood
fields.value: Whole-piece white birch face, UV coat prefinishing available, CARB Phase 2 compliant.

fields.label: Product overview: JAS plywood
fields.value: Structural, concrete forming and general use — F★★★★ rated to Japan Agricultural Standard.

fields.label: Product overview: Marine Plywood
fields.value: BS 1088 certified, Grade A face & back, WBP bonding — the marine industry benchmark.

fields.label: Biochar: overview
fields.value: Biochar is a carbon residue derived from waste biomass through pyrolysis — heating at high temperature with limited oxygen. Produced alongside clean energy at our syngas and biochar facility, it turns wood waste into a high-value, carbon-negative material with applications across construction and agriculture.

fields.label: Biochar: carbon-negative feature
fields.value: Carbon-negative — locks captured carbon into a stable form that can be stored for over 1,000 years.

fields.label: Biochar: wood waste feature
fields.value: From our own wood waste — a circular by-product of our energy generation, with zero residue to landfill.

fields.label: Biochar: dual application feature
fields.value: Dual application — engineered for both civil infrastructure and high-yield sustainable agriculture.

fields.label: Biochar: road base heading
fields.value: Road Base & Concrete Applications

fields.label: Biochar: road base copy
fields.value: By integrating biochar into road bases and concrete, we build stronger, more durable infrastructure with a significantly lower carbon footprint. It enhances road stability by improving load distribution and reducing moisture damage, and reinforces concrete structures without affecting setting times. Replacing traditional fillers with biochar (typically 0.5–5% by weight) delivers high-performance civil engineering solutions that are as resilient as they are responsible.

fields.label: Biochar: fertiliser heading
fields.value: Fertiliser & Soil Application Performance

fields.label: Biochar: fertiliser copy
fields.value: Biochar acts as a powerful “nutrient sponge” that boosts fertiliser efficiency while protecting the environment. Blending just 2–5% with NPK fertilisers can reduce total fertiliser usage by 20–30%, locking in nutrients and releasing them slowly to plants. Fully compatible with organic, mineral and liquid fertilisers, it improves soil structure and stores carbon for over 1,000 years — a definitive solution for high-yield, sustainable agriculture.

fields.label: Hardwood Plywood: heading
fields.value: Hardwood Plywood

fields.label: Hardwood Plywood: overview
fields.value: Our flagship export product — manufactured using selected Malaysian tropical hardwoods in red and white species. Produced with Japanese machinery and rigorously graded for uniformity in grade and colour, making it the most sought-after plywood on international markets.

fields.label: Birch Face Plywood: heading
fields.value: Birch Face Plywood

fields.label: Birch Face Plywood: overview
fields.value: Whole-piece white birch face veneer — no finger joints, no patches. The clean, pale aesthetic of natural birch makes this panel ideal for furniture, cabinetry, and interior fit-out. UV coat prefinishing is available on one or both faces for a ready-to-use surface direct from the mill.

fields.label: JAS Plywood: heading
fields.value: JAS Certification Plywood

fields.label: JAS Plywood: overview
fields.value: Manufactured to meet Japan Agricultural Standard (JAS Law) requirements, our JAS plywood covers three purpose-built categories — Structural, Concrete Forming, and General Ordinary Use. All products carry F★★★★ rating, the highest Japanese formaldehyde emission standard.

fields.label: Marine Plywood: heading
fields.value: Marine Plywood

fields.label: Marine Plywood: overview
fields.value: Holding BS 1088 — the internationally recognised benchmark for marine-grade plywood — our marine panels feature Grade A veneer on both face and back, bonded with WBP Phenol Formaldehyde adhesive for a fully waterproof, permanent bond. Q-Mark certification provides independent third-party verification of every batch.

fields.label: Certifications: heading
fields.value: Certified to the highest global standards.

fields.label: Certifications: overview
fields.value: Every panel we ship is backed by internationally recognised certification bodies. From sustainable forest sourcing to formaldehyde emission control and marine-grade quality assurance — our credentials are independently verified, not self-declared.

fields.label: Applications: heading
fields.value: Where our panels are specified.

fields.label: Call to action: heading
fields.value: Ready to specify?

fields.label: Call to action: copy
fields.value: Tell us your grade, adhesive type, sheet size and volume — we'll respond with pricing and lead times within 24 hours.
